title: Hyundai to show MobED at AW as robotics, AI expand in manufacturing
description:
MobED, a mobile robot from Hyundai, is just one of the systems from leading Korean and global companies that will be at AW 2026.

The post Hyundai to show MobED at AW as robotics, AI expand in manufacturing appeared first on The Robot Report.
